description_long: This is a rectangular, teal-colored metal toolbox with a hinged lid and a secure latch at the front. The interior is lined with a molded insert that holds a set of precision tools, including a cylindrical instrument and several small bits or attachments, all neatly organized in individual slots. The lid features a foam or felt lining for added protection of the tools and a metallic clasp for secure closure. The exterior of the box is smooth and features embossed branding and a logo on the top surface. The toolbox is compact and portable, designed for easy transport and storage of specialized tools. Its robust construction and organized interior make it suitable for professional or technical use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or maintenance vehicles.
description: A compact teal metal toolbox with a hinged lid, secure latch, and organized interior for precision tools. Features embossed branding and a protective foam lining inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open toolbox with a full set of tools, foam-lined lid, and organized slots.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the box, the cylindrical tool, and partially open lid.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed toolbox, displaying the embossed branding and logo on the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the open lid, tool arrangement, and internal compartments.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular metal handle integrated into the front edge of the box, designed for carrying; no folding or telescopic features visible.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front clasp latch made of metal, simple snap-shut design with no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed logo and text on the top of the lid; one rectangular area with readable text and one diamond-shaped emblem.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single main compartment with a molded insert featuring multiple slots for tools and bits; no removable trays or external compartments visible.
attribute_external_labeling: Embossed rectangular label with text on the top lid
Embossed diamond-shaped logo on the top lid
